error.fallback_profile_required.template: Choose an approved saved fallback provider or turn fallback off.

error.file.invalid_utf8.template: The selected file is not valid UTF-8 text.

error.file_export.template: The translated output could not be saved.

error.file_open.template: The selected text file could not be opened.

error.file_read.template: The selected text file could not be read.

error.file_too_large.template: The selected text file exceeds the 4 MiB limit.

error.glossary_rule_invalid.template: Glossary entries contain invalid or credential-like data.

error.history_export.template: The translation history could not be saved.

error.incompatible_core.template: Este aplicativo requer uma biblioteca LinguaMesh Core compatível.

error.invalid_profile.template: Informe o nome do provedor, o endpoint e o modelo.

error.memory_export.template: The translation memory could not be saved.

error.network_unavailable.template: Verifique sua conexão de rede e tente novamente.

error.ocr_invalid_document.template: The PDF could not be rendered for OCR.

error.ocr_no_text.template: OCR did not find readable text.

error.ocr_output_too_large.template: The OCR output exceeds the safety limit.

error.output_open.template: The exported output could not be opened.

error.profile.id_generation_failed.template: A unique provider profile ID could not be generated.

error.profile.id_invalid.template: The generated provider profile ID is invalid: {error}

error.profile.not_found.template: The saved provider profile no longer exists.

error.profile.saved_model_update_failed.template: The saved model could not be updated.

error.profile_disabled.template: The selected provider profile is disabled.

error.profile_unavailable.template: The selected saved profile is unavailable.

error.provider.loopback_start_failed.template: Failed to start the loopback provider: {error}

error.provider.model_unavailable.template: The selected model is not available from the active provider.

error.provider.select_model_requires_con.template: Connect a provider before selecting a model.

error.provider.session_ref_required.template: A session credential requires an explicit session secret reference.

error.provider.stale_model_selection.template: The model selection belongs to a stale provider.

error.provider.unconfirmed_model.template: The translation request does not use the confirmed model selection.

error.routing_constraints_invalid.template: Use comma-separated ASCII identifiers and positive numeric limits.

error.routing_profile_export.template: The routing profile JSON could not be saved.

error.routing_profile_id_exists.template: A routing profile with this ID already exists. Edit it or choose another ID.

error.routing_profile_id_invalid.template: Use 1-128 ASCII letters, numbers, '.', '_' or '-' for the routing profile ID.

error.routing_profile_import.template: The routing profile JSON could not be imported.

error.routing_profile_no_candidates.template: Save at least one provider profile before creating a routing profile.

error.runtime.start_failed.template: Failed to start the core runtime: {error}

error.secret.request_channel_closed.template: The host secret request channel closed.

error.secret.request_inactive.template: The Core secret request was no longer active.

error.state.connecting.template: A provider connection is still in progress.

error.state.event_after_terminal.template: The core stream produced an event after termination.

error.state.invalid_saved_profile.template: The saved provider profile does not match this operation.

error.state.model_change_busy.template: A model cannot be changed while a translation is running.

error.state.model_selection_pending.template: A model selection is still being confirmed.

error.state.non_increasing_sequence.template: The core stream produced an out-of-order event.

error.state.profile_deletion_pending.template: A saved profile deletion is still being confirmed.

error.state.profile_removal_busy.template: A saved profile cannot be removed while a translation is running.

error.state.provider_change_busy.template: A provider cannot be changed while a translation is running.

error.state.stream_missing_terminal.template: The core event stream ended without a terminal event.

error.state.unexpected_first_event.template: The core stream did not begin with a started event.

error.state.unexpected_model_selection.template: The model selection result is stale or unexpected.

error.state.unexpected_profile_deletion.template: The saved profile deletion result is stale or unexpected.

error.state.unexpected_provider_connecti.template: The provider connection result is stale or unexpected.

error.state.unexpected_started_event.template: The core stream produced more than one started event.

error.storage.cleanup_failed.template: Secret Service cleanup failed after profile removal.

error.storage.directory_create.template: The profile database directory could not be created.

error.storage.directory_inspect.template: The profile database directory could not be inspected.

error.storage.directory_invalid.template: The profile database directory is invalid.

error.storage.directory_permissions.template: The profile database directory permissions are not private.

error.storage.file_inspect.template: The profile database file could not be inspected.

error.storage.file_open.template: The profile database file could not be opened.

error.storage.file_permissions.template: The profile database file permissions could not be restricted.

error.storage.file_regular.template: The profile database must be a private regular file.

error.storage.path_absolute.template: The profile database path must be absolute.

error.storage.path_components_inspect.template: The profile database path components could not be inspected.

error.storage.path_inspect.template: The profile database path could not be inspected.

error.storage.path_symlink.template: The profile database path cannot contain symbolic links.

error.storage.prompt_dismissed.template: O prompt do Secret Service foi fechado.

error.storage.remove_failed.template: Profile storage is unavailable; no saved profile was removed.

error.storage.session_only.template: Profile storage is unavailable; use session-only mode.

error.unknown.template: A tradução falhou. Revise os diagnósticos e tente novamente.

error.worker.command_queue_unavailable.template: The core command queue is unavailable or full.

field.api_key.template: Chave de API (opcional para provedores locais)

field.glossary.placeholder.template: source => target; Product Name => Product Name

variants.enabled: O histórico é salvo neste dispositivo
variants.incognito: O modo anônimo não salva esta tradução

locale.note.drafts.template: Simplified Chinese resources are loaded from the pinned runtime catalog; translations remain unreviewed drafts.

notification.body.template: The translated output is ready in LinguaMesh.

onboarding.description.template: Seu conteúdo vai diretamente para o provedor configurado. O LinguaMesh nunca inclui uma chave de API.

onboarding.detail.configure_empty.template: Create a provider profile below, enter a credential only if required, then choose Connect. Remembering uses Secret Service; otherwise the credential remains in memory for this session only.

onboarding.detail.configure_saved.template: Choose a saved profile below, re-enter its credential if required, then choose Connect. Restored profiles never connect automatically.

onboarding.detail.confirm_model.template: Confirming model {model}. Translation remains disabled until this selection is committed.

onboarding.detail.connecting.template: Validating {provider} [{profile_id}] and discovering models. The previous active provider remains unchanged until this succeeds.

onboarding.detail.connecting_generic.template: Validating the provider and discovering models. The previous active provider remains unchanged until this succeeds.

onboarding.detail.persistence_warning.template: Saved profile storage is unavailable; profile persistence is disabled, Remember stays off, and credentials remain session only.

onboarding.detail.ready.template: Next request: {provider} · {model}. Use the saved-profile list and Connect to switch deliberately.

onboarding.detail.select_model.template: Choose a discovered model. Translation remains disabled until the selection is confirmed.

onboarding.detail.starting.template: Checking profile storage and starting the local validation provider. No provider connection is made automatically.

onboarding.detail.storage_unavailable.template: Saved profile storage is unavailable. Configure a provider below and leave Remember off; credentials stay in memory for this session only.

onboarding.detail.unavailable.template: The core worker is unavailable. Restart the application and review any error below; no provider request can be sent.

option.remember_profile.template: Remember profile, model, and credential in Secret Service

placeholder.provider_account_identifier.template: Optional non-secret account or tenant identifier

placeholder.provider_client_certificate_.template: Optional PEM client certificate and private key identity

placeholder.provider_custom_headers.template: Optional JSON object of non-secret request headers

placeholder.provider_notes.template: Optional non-secret note for this saved profile

placeholder.provider_proxy.template: Optional proxy URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8080

placeholder.provider_region.template: Optional provider region or deployment geography

placeholder.provider_secret_custom_heade.template: Optional JSON object of secret request headers

placeholder.provider_trusted_certificate.template: Optional PEM certificate bundle; TLS verification remains enabled

profile.storage_note.template: Names, endpoints, model preferences, and credentials can be remembered through Secret Service. Credentials are cleared from this form immediately and remain session-only when secure storage is unavailable. Removing a saved profile does not disconnect its current session.

provider.disconnected.template: No provider connected. Credentials stay session-only unless remembered through Secret Service.

provider.mode.pending_saved.template: will be saved with Secret Service credential protection when supplied

provider.saved_restored.template: Saved non-secret profiles were restored. Choose one, enter its credential if required, then connect.

status.cancelled.template: Tradução cancelada. A saída parcial foi mantida.

status.connection_tested.template: Connection test passed for {provider}; {model_count} models are available.

status.exported.template: Translation saved to the selected file.

status.fallback_selected.template: The approved fallback provider was selected; content may be sent there.

status.glossary_libraries_empty.template: No local glossary libraries are stored.

status.history_disabled.template: Local translation history is disabled; existing entries are kept.

status.history_empty.template: No local translation history is stored.

status.history_exported.template: Translation history was exported to the selected file.

status.history_not_saved.template: The translation completed, but local history could not be saved.

status.incognito.template: Incognito mode is active for this request.

status.memory_disabled.template: Local translation memory is disabled; existing entries are kept.

status.memory_empty.template: No local translation memory is stored.

status.memory_exported.template: Translation memory was exported to the selected file.

status.memory_not_saved.template: The translation completed, but local translation memory could not be saved.

status.report_exported.template: Translation report saved to the selected file.

tooltip.about.template: Show application and shared-core version information

tooltip.clear_history.template: Delete all locally stored translation history

tooltip.clear_memory.template: Delete all locally stored translation memory entries

tooltip.credential.template: Optional credential; it is kept in memory unless remembered through Secret Service

tooltip.document_jobs.template: Inspect persisted document jobs and their progress

tooltip.enable_ocr.template: When enabled, use the optional Tesseract plugin for image-only PDF pages and import page-marked text

tooltip.endpoint.template: HTTPS or loopback HTTP OpenAI-compatible base endpoint

tooltip.endpoint.azure_openai.template: HTTPS Azure OpenAI resource endpoint; enter the deployment name as the model

tooltip.endpoint.gemini.template: HTTPS or loopback HTTP Gemini Generate Content /v1beta endpoint

tooltip.endpoint.ollama.template: HTTPS or loopback HTTP native Ollama /api endpoint

tooltip.endpoint.openai_responses.template: HTTPS OpenAI Responses /v1 endpoint with typed streaming events

tooltip.export_glossary.template: Save the current glossary rules as a UTF-8 CSV file

tooltip.export_output.template: Save the translated output to a new file

tooltip.export_report.template: Save a redacted TSV report for this document job

tooltip.fallback.template: Retry only retryable network failures with this saved provider; document jobs, cancellation, and credential failures never fall back

tooltip.glossary.template: Optional semicolon-separated source => target glossary rules; entries stay in memory for this translation.

tooltip.glossary_id.template: Use 1-128 ASCII letters, numbers, '.', '_' or '-' for the glossary library ID.

tooltip.glossary_libraries.template: Inspect, select, and delete reusable local glossary libraries

tooltip.import_glossary.template: Load glossary rules from a UTF-8 CSV file

tooltip.incognito.template: Do not persist source, output, history, or translation-memory data for this request

tooltip.model.anthropic.template: Enter the Anthropic model ID before connecting; model discovery is manual for this preset

tooltip.model.azure_openai.template: Enter the Azure OpenAI deployment name before connecting; model discovery is manual for this preset

tooltip.model.openai_responses.template: Models are discovered from the OpenAI Responses-compatible endpoint

tooltip.open_output.template: Open the most recently exported translation output

tooltip.open_source.template: Carregar um arquivo de texto UTF-8 no editor de origem

tooltip.open_source_licenses.template: Review the licenses and third-party notices included with this build

tooltip.provider_account_identifier.template: Optional account identifier used to distinguish provider tenants

tooltip.provider_client_certificate_iden.template: Kept in memory for the connection and stored in Secret Service only when remembered

tooltip.provider_connection_timeout.template: Provider connection timeout in seconds, from 1 to 120

tooltip.provider_custom_headers.template: Optional bounded non-secret headers; authorization and credential headers are rejected

tooltip.provider_notes.template: Optional non-secret note for this saved profile

tooltip.provider_organization.template: Optional organization identifier sent to OpenAI-compatible endpoints

tooltip.provider_preset.template: Choose the provider protocol used for model discovery and streaming

tooltip.provider_project.template: Optional project identifier sent to OpenAI-compatible endpoints

tooltip.provider_proxy.template: Optional HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS5, or SOCKS5H proxy without embedded credentials

tooltip.provider_proxy_credentials.template: Stored in Secret Service when remembered and never embedded in the proxy URL

tooltip.provider_region.template: Optional non-secret region identifier used by the provider account

tooltip.provider_request_timeout.template: Total provider request timeout in seconds, from 1 to 600

tooltip.provider_secret_custom_headers.template: Optional bounded secret headers; stored in Secret Service when remembered and otherwise kept for this session

tooltip.provider_streaming_idle_timeout.template: Provider streaming idle timeout in seconds, from 1 to 300

tooltip.provider_trusted_certificates_pe.template: Optional trusted certificate PEM bundle; system roots remain trusted and TLS verification stays enabled

tooltip.quality_mode.template: Rápido usa uma passagem direta; Equilibrado adiciona verificações estruturais determinísticas; Melhor solicita crítica e revisão internas.

tooltip.remember_profile.template: Save non-secret profile data and the credential through Secret Service

tooltip.remove_profile.template: Remove the selected saved profile without disconnecting its current session

tooltip.retry_translation.template: Retry the last failed or cancelled text translation

tooltip.routing_allow_remote.template: Permit this profile to send content to non-local providers

tooltip.routing_identifier_list.template: Comma-separated provider or model identifiers; leave blank for no list

tooltip.routing_local_only.template: Reject saved providers that are not local loopback endpoints

tooltip.routing_max_request_bytes.template: Leave blank for no profile-level request size limit; otherwise use a positive byte count

tooltip.routing_minimum_quality.template: Leave blank to accept every quality tier

tooltip.routing_preference.template: Choose the first ranking preference used by Automatic routing

tooltip.routing_privacy_sensitive.template: When a request is marked privacy-sensitive, reject remote candidates

tooltip.routing_profiles.template: Create, inspect, and delete non-secret routing planner profiles

tooltip.routing_require_document.template: Keep only candidates that advertise document translation

tooltip.routing_require_streaming.template: Reject candidates that cannot return real streamed deltas

tooltip.save_glossary.template: Save the current validated glossary as a reusable local library

tooltip.save_history.template: Persist completed standard translations in local history; existing entries are kept when disabled

tooltip.save_memory.template: Reuse and persist completed standard translations in local translation memory

tooltip.saved_profile.template: Choose a saved non-secret profile or create a new profile

tooltip.test_connection.template: Check the provider model endpoint without switching or saving the active profile

tooltip.translation_preset.template: Aplica ao próximo pedido uma preferência limitada de domínio, tom, formalidade e público

tooltip.view_history.template: Inspect, export, or delete individual local translation history entries

tooltip.view_memory.template: Inspect, export, or delete individual local translation memory entries

warning.pdf_image_only_pages.template: PDF page(s) {pages} contain no extractable text; OCR is not enabled.

warning.pdf_reconstruction_limited.template: PDF layout fidelity is limited; page association is preserved, but pixel-identical output is not guaranteed.

warning.pdf_uncertain_order.template: PDF page(s) {pages} have uncertain reading order; review the structured output.

warning.subtitle_line_length.template: Subtitle cue(s) {cues} exceed the {limit}-character line guidance.

warning.subtitle_reading_speed.template: Subtitle cue(s) {cues} exceed the {limit}-character-per-second reading-speed guidance.
